title: Elevate UI Refinement: Master CSS font-kerning for Precise Typographic Spacing
tweet: Refine your UI typography! Discover how CSS 'font-kerning' enhances letter spacing for a professional, legible look. A small CSS tweak, a huge UX impact. #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UIDesign #UserExperience
tip: Achieve professional-grade typographic spacing by judiciously applying CSS 'font-kerning'. While 'auto' is often the default, explicitly setting 'font-kerning: normal;' ensures kerning data embedded in your web fonts is utilized for improved letter spacing, especially crucial for display text and headings. Be mindful of browser support and test across different environments to ensure consistent visual quality. For performance-critical situations with large bodies of text, 'none' might be considered, but 'normal' offers superior aesthetic quality, significantly boosting readability and perceived UI quality.
